Multiple bystander videos show Alex Pretti standing nearby filming federal agents when they rushed him, tried to seize his phone, and forced him to the ground. The footage does not show him threatening agents or firing a weapon. He appears to be tackled during a chaotic struggle and then shot while restrained. Federal claims that this was a defensive, armed encounter are directly contradicted by the videos now publicly available, which is why journalists, legal experts, and local officials are calling for an independent investigation. This was an escalation by ICE, not a justified use of lethal force.

The man brutally murdered by ICE in Minneapolis today FOR NO REASON has been identified as 37-year-old Minneapolis resident and American CITIZEN Alex Jeffrey Pretti. Alex was a registered nurse with NO CRIMINAL RECORD. He was an athlete and avid outdoorsman. He worked for the VA, where he cared for veterans. He had a legal permit to carry, and video clearly shows that he did NOT brandish his gun at ICE officers. He was an ICE observer who was legally recording the ICE agents’ actions when he was stopped, detained, DISARMED, and THEN shot several times by ICE agents. Alex had a permit to carry He was legally exercising his 2nd Amendment right. He did not draw the weapon. He was filming when they approached him. ICE agents had taken his weapon from its holster before they shot him. It was MURDER. Let all that sink in. Please like and share to spread the word!
